scope: AgenC MagicDocs service port: tagged markdown read detection, idle post-sampling document updates, Edit-only subagent policy, inaccessible-file eviction, and maintenance prompt construction.

requiredBehaviors: extracts optional italicized instructions immediately after the header
edgeCases: one blank line between header and instructions is accepted

requiredBehaviors: successful text FileRead calls notify MagicDocs listeners with the canonical path and raw read content
initMagicDocs registers an idempotent listener that tracks tagged markdown paths
edgeCases: listener cleanup for tests does not leave global duplicate listeners

requiredBehaviors: main-thread terminal turns launch the MagicDocs post-sampling updater
updates are skipped when the last assistant turn still has tool calls
the updater builds a maintenance prompt from the current file contents
the child session is restricted to Edit on the tracked file path
the child session read-before-edit state is seeded from the current document
edgeCases: the parent read-file cache is cloned and the tracked file entry is removed before update work
missing or inaccessible files are evicted from tracking instead of crashing the turn

requiredBehaviors: default prompt preserves the donor editing rules under AgenC terminology
variable substitution is single-pass and leaves unknown variables unchanged
edgeCases: missing custom prompt silently falls back to the default template
